notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan singles on a soft bunt ground ball to third baseman Brendan Donovan. Brayan Rocchio scores. Steven Kwan to 2nd. Steven Kwan advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Brendan Donovan.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Canzone pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Canzone pops out to third baseman José Ramírez in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Brendan Donovan steals (1) 3rd base. Victor Robles steals (1) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Leo Rivas GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Leo Rivas grounds into a double play, second baseman Daniel Schneemann to shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Luke Raley out at 2nd. Leo Rivas out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan singles on a soft bunt ground ball to third baseman Brendan Donovan. Brayan Rocchio scores. Steven Kwan to 2nd. Steven Kwan advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Brendan Donovan.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan singles on a soft bunt ground ball to third baseman Brendan Donovan. Brayan Rocchio scores. Steven Kwan to 2nd. Steven Kwan advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Brendan Donovan.

notableEvents.label: Luke Raley pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luke Raley homers (3) on a fly ball to center field. Randy Arozarena scores.
